verdict: PARTIAL — coef=+0.2681, p=0; claim direction not auto-inferred
verdict_reason: coef=+0.2681, p=0; claim direction not auto-inferred
falsification_rule_text: Not supported if (a) the channel decomposition cannot bound any channel's share away from zero with 80% confidence (decomposition underidentified), OR (b) weather attribution exceeds 60% of the total cut (would imply the policy + behavioural response was minor), OR (c) industrial-destruction share is statistically zero (would refute the capacity-loss interpretation), OR (d) the second-winter cut is entirely weather-explained with no remaining policy/behavioural component (would suggest first-winter response was not durable).

estimate.method: statsmodels OLS FE fallback (linearmodels failed: exog does not have full column rank. If you wish to proceed with model estimation irrespective of the numerical accuracy of coefficient estimates, you can set check_rank=False.)

variables_loaded.name: weather_attributable_savings_share
variables_loaded.source: constructed: counterfactual gas consumption holding HDD at 2017-2021 monthly mean; difference = weather component.

variables_loaded.name: power_fuel_switching_share
variables_loaded.source: constructed: change in power-sector gas use vs. counterfactual at constant power-mix; residual after coal/nuclear/renewables substitution accounting.

variables_missing.name: log_coal_generation
variables_missing.source: constructed: ENTSO-E aggregated thermal generation by fuel — coal/lignite. entsoe fetcher pending; Eurostat nrg_cb_em as fallback.

variables_missing.name: post_aug_2022_gas_emergency_dummy
variables_missing.source: constructed: indicator = 1 from August 2022 (EU 15% gas-demand reduction regulation effective) through March 2023; 0 otherwise. Secondary: 1 through March 2024 for second-winter test.

variables_missing.name: industrial_destruction_share
variables_missing.source: constructed: industrial gas use change net of industrial-output-weighted change (proxy: IPI or sectoral VA). Residual after output-adjusted gas decline = efficiency/destruction component split.

variables_missing.name: residential_conservation_share
variables_missing.source: constructed: change in residential gas use after weather-normalisation (HDD-adjusted).

variables_missing.name: log_ttf_gas_price
variables_missing.source: constructed: Dutch TTF spot, monthly. eex fetcher or manual-drop pending.

variables_missing.name: gas_storage_filling_level
variables_missing.source: constructed: AGSI+ EU gas-storage filling level by country, monthly. Manual-drop pending.
